features.title: Unified message API
features.description: shui message <type> <text> covers success, error, warning, info, and muted in a single consistent command

features.title: Token-based theme engine
features.description: swap colours, icons, and styles via environment variables without touching component code

features.title: Inline components
features.description: badge and pill write to stdout without a newline, composing naturally inside $(...) expressions

features.title: Interactive prompts
features.description: confirm, select, radio, multiselect, and input with keyboard navigation and sensible defaults

features.title: Progress & spinners
features.description: progress, spinner, and loader with optional native iTerm2 dock badge integration

features.title: Zero dependencies
features.description: a single source shui.zsh is all you need; no npm, no brew, no external tools

features.title: NO_COLOR aware
features.description: respects the NO_COLOR convention; degrades gracefully to plain ASCII in constrained environments

install:
git clone https://github.com/kud/shui ~/.shui
source ~/.shui/shui.zsh

shui message success "Deployment complete"
shui message error   "Build failed"
shui message warning "Deprecated flag used"
shui message info    "Running in dry-run mode"
shui message muted   "Skipped (already up-to-date)"
